div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does it carry on a relevant financial-business activity
(banking, trust, CSP, investment business, fund admin,
MSB, digital asset business, long-term insurance)?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is it a regulated non-financial business?
(real estate, dealers in high-value goods, gaming…)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AML-supervised by another competent authority
(Superintendent of Real Estate, Gaming Commission…)
— not the BMA. Out of this agent's lane.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Likely outside the AML/ATF perimeter —
DOCUMENT the basis (the no-scope decision is itself a record)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AML/ATF-REGULATED FINANCIAL INSTITUTION
POCA 1997 + AMLR 2008 apply; BMA is the AML supervisor (SE Act 2008)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does a LICENSING exemption apply?
(e.g. private trust company under the Trust Exemption Order 2002,
or a CSP-Act carve-out for an already-AML-regulated entity)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
The licensing exemption does NOT remove AML/ATF obligations
— since 2018 exempt PTCs are still AML/ATF-regulated FIs.
Full CDD/EDD/MLRO/reporting still apply.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Full licensee — AML/ATF obligations apply in full
(CDD/EDD, risk assessment, MLRO, SAR reporting to the FIA)
